channel.title: Lunote Blog
channel.description: Local-first Markdown notes, PKM, and developer productivity

item.title: Markdown files vs knowledge systems for developers
item.description: Plain Markdown is the right foundation—but folders alone are not a graph. What wiki links and backlinks add on top of .md files.

item.title: How structured thinking improves coding workflows
item.description: Linking design decisions, ADRs, and runbooks turns one-off debugging into durable team memory.

item.title: Local-first apps and the future of productivity tools
item.description: Why offline-capable, file-based tools are winning back trust from cloud-only note platforms.

item.title: Why developers need a knowledge system—not just notes
item.description: Scattered notes capture facts; a system captures relationships, context, and reusable thinking patterns.
